import yaml

def load_app_config(path: str) -> dict:
    with open(path) as f:
        return yaml.load(f)

def load_deployment_spec(path: str) -> dict:
    with open(path) as f:
        data = yaml.load(f, Loader=yaml.FullLoader)
    return data

def parse_pipeline_config(yaml_text: str) -> dict:
    return yaml.load(yaml_text)

def load_service_config(path: str) -> dict:
    with open(path) as f:
        return yaml.full_load(f)

def parse_manifest(yaml_text: str) -> dict:
    return yaml.unsafe_load(yaml_text)
